channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding the Risks and Popularity of Molly (MDMA) Among Young People
item.description: Molly, often described as the pure powdered or crystalline form of MDMA, has gained significant popularity among young people, particularly at music festivals and concerts. Unlike Ecstasy, which is us...

item.title: Study Reveals Common Illnesses in Toddlers During Their First Year of Nursery
item.description: A recent study has examined the frequency and impact of illnesses among toddlers during their first year of nursery. Researchers found that children typically experience 15 illnesses in this period, r...

item.title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Amid Inflation Concerns and Middle East Conflict
item.description: The Federal Reserve announced it will maintain interest rates at 3.5%-3.75% for the second consecutive meeting in 2026, signaling one projected rate cut later this year. The decision comes amid rising...

item.title: Investigation Reports Allegations of Sexual Assault by Cesar Chavez
item.description: A recent investigation by the New York Times has revealed disturbing allegations of sexual assault against Cesar Chavez, the prominent labor leader known for advocating farmworkers' rights in Californ...

item.title: UK Government Withdraws Proposal Allowing AI Access to Copyrighted Music
item.description: The UK government has decided to scrap proposed copyright law exceptions that would have allowed artificial intelligence (AI) companies to use copyrighted music without the permission of songwriters a...

item.title: Practical Gemini AI Tools in Google Workspace for Productivity
item.description: Google has been steadily integrating its Gemini AI across Google Workspace, bringing smart automation to Docs, Gmail, Sheets, Slides, Drive, Meet, Calendar, Chat, Vids, and Forms. In Google Docs, Gemi...

item.title: Australian Fashion Faces Talent Shortage as Designers Move Overseas
item.description: Australia has produced some of the world’s top fashion talent, but its local industry struggles to retain designers. Between 2009 and 2019, only three of the 19 Australian Fashion Foundation (AFF) sch...

item.title: Subglacial Granite Mass Discovered Beneath Pine Island Glacier in Antarctica
item.description: Researchers from the British Antarctic Survey (BAS) have uncovered a massive granite formation hidden beneath Pine Island Glacier in West Antarctica, triggered by the presence of unusual pink granite ...

item.title: Anas Sarwar maintains stance on Starmer resignation but continues political dialogue
item.description: Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar has confirmed that he has not had direct communication with Sir Keir Starmer since publicly suggesting the Prime Minister should resign in February. Sarwar stated he...

item.title: Sadio Mane Condemns CAF Over Senegal Losing AFCON 2025 Title to Morocco
item.description: Sadio Mané, di Senegal forward, don yan strong tori against CAF after dem take Senegal AFCON 2025 title waka give Morocco. According to CAF Appeal Board, di Senegal team leave di pitch during di final...

item.title: India Introduces Stricter Solid Waste Management Rules with Four-Way Segregation and Landfill Limits
item.description: India’s Ministry of Environment has issued new solid waste management rules of 2026, replacing the 2016 rules, with the aim of improving compliance and accountability in waste management. The new regu...

item.title: Religious leaders in Zanzibar stress early moral and religious guidance for youth
item.description: In Zanzibar, religious leaders are emphasising the importance of instilling strong moral values in children and young people from an early age. Deputy Mufti Mahmoud Mussa Wadi highlighted this point d...

item.title: University of Alabama Student Reported Missing in Barcelona During Spring Break
item.description: James 'Jimmy' Gracey, a 20-year-old junior at the University of Alabama from Elmhurst, Illinois, has been reported missing in Barcelona, Spain. Gracey was last seen around 3 a.m. local time outside Sh...

item.title: Studies on AI and Job Loss Overlook Its Impact on Online Content and Internet Ecosystems
item.description: Recent studies by AI companies and academics, including a paper by Anthropic, attempt to predict which jobs may be at risk due to artificial intelligence. These studies typically focus on AI's potenti...

item.title: Saudi Arabia Confirms Eidul Fitr on Friday Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Saudi Arabia has officially announced that Eidul Fitr will be observed on Friday, after the Supreme Court confirmed that Thursday marks the completion of the 30th day of Ramazan. The announcement came...

item.title: Philippine Women's Football Team Aims for FIFA World Cup Qualification Against Uzbekistan
item.description: The Philippine women's national football team, also known as the Filipinas, is one match away from qualifying for the 2027 FIFA Women’s World Cup in Brazil. They will face Uzbekistan in a crucial play...

item.title: Trump administration proposes changes to broadcasting to increase patriotic content
item.description: The Trump administration is reportedly pursuing a strategy to influence American media by encouraging broadcasters to air more patriotic content, aiming to maintain nationalist sentiment beyond the na...

item.title: Iran Executes Swedish Citizen Amid Rising Tensions in Gulf
item.description: Iran has executed a Swedish citizen amid escalating tensions in the Gulf region, further intensifying the ongoing conflict with the US and Israel. On Wednesday, Iran’s Pars gas field—the country’s sec...

item.title: Maguindanao Municipal Councilor Shot Dead in Barangay Poblacion
item.description: On the morning of March 18, 2026, a municipal councilor in Paglat, Maguindanao del Sur, was fatally shot by gunmen in front of local villagers. The victim, Samoan Kitalok, was speaking with neighbors ...

item.title: WIRED Announces Livestream Panel on Defense Tech Industry's Role in Modern Conflicts and U.S. Military Operations
item.description: WIRED is hosting a subscriber-only livestream event titled 'The War Machine' on March 26, 2026, at noon EDT (9 am PDT). The panel features WIRED experts Tim Marchman (Director of science, politics, an...
